title: Armor
description: Data definition for a piece of armor providing zone coverage in combat.

material_id.description: Reference to data/materials/<id>.json. Determines DR bonuses on top of item base stats.

material.description: Legacy broad category (kept for backwards compat). Prefer material_id.

layer.description: Wear layer. base_layer = innermost (linen shirt); clothing = mid (wool tunic, padded jack); armor = outer protective (mail, plate); shield = held in off-hand.

quality.description: Crafting quality. Modifies DR: poor=×0.75, standard=×1.0, fine=×1.25, masterwork=×1.5.

coverage_zones.description: body_zone_id -> coverage float (0.0 = no protection, 1.0 = full protection). Unlisted zones have 0 coverage.

damage_reduction.description: Per damage_type flat reduction applied before coverage. Keys: slash, pierce, blunt.

encumbrance.description: Movement penalty contribution. Total encumbrance above threshold reduces speed and stamina regen.

durability.description: Max durability points. Each hit that penetrates coverage reduces durability by 1. At 0, armor is destroyed.
